$comment: Monochrome (Ink) — austere. The lead role maps to ink/grey so the deck carries no brand hue; the single accent (mustard) is the one highlight, exactly as DESIGN.md prescribes. Emphasis must survive the loss of hue: the focal value uses ink_strong (darker than body ink 2D332E) and the focal card uses surface (a deeper calm panel than the non-focal surface_tint), so a focal KPI/card still reads distinct from a plain one. Charts go greyscale with the focal series in ink.

$template.label: モノクローム / Ink
$template.use: 主張を数字と構造だけで通す硬派な資料。色相を持たず、強調はインクの濃淡とアクセント1点で作る。
